<!-- @type: chapter | @id: classes -->
# Classes

A hero's class determines their role in combat.

<!-- @type: class | @id: fury -->
## Fury

The fury is a primal warrior who channels raw, unchecked rage.

**Heroic Resource: Ferocity**

### Basics

**Starting Characteristics:** Might 2, Agility 2

###### Fury Advancement Table

| Level | Features                          | Abilities         |
|-------|-----------------------------------|-------------------|
| 1st   | Ferocity, Growing Ferocity        | Signature, 3, 5   |
| 2nd   | Perk, Aspect Feature              | Signature, 3, 5   |

<!-- @type: feature-group | @level: 1 -->
### 1st-Level Features

As a 1st-level fury, you gain the following features.

<!-- @type: feature -->
#### Growing Ferocity

You gain certain benefits in combat based on the amount of ferocity you have.

###### Berserker Growing Ferocity Table

| Ferocity | Benefit                                                |
|----------|--------------------------------------------------------|
| 2        | Knockback bonus equal to Might score.                  |
| 4        | First push on a turn grants 1 surge.                   |
| 6        | Edge on Might tests and Knockback.                     |

###### Reaver Growing Ferocity Table

| Ferocity | Benefit                                                |
|----------|--------------------------------------------------------|
| 2        | Knockback bonus equal to Agility score.                |
| 4        | First slide on a turn grants 1 surge.                  |
| 6        | Edge on Agility tests and Knockback.                   |

<!-- @type: feature -->
#### 1st-Level Aspect Features

Your primordial aspect grants you two features.

###### 1st-Level Aspect Features Table

| Aspect     | Feature                        |
|------------|--------------------------------|
| Berserker  | Kit, Primordial Strength       |
| Reaver     | Kit, Primordial Cunning        |
| Stormwight | Beast Shape, Relentless Hunter |

<!-- @type: ability | @subtype: signature -->
#### Brutal Slam

*You slam your weapon into a foe with awesome might.*

| **Melee, Strike, Weapon** | **Main action** |
| --- | ---: |
| **Melee 1** | **One creature** |

**Power Roll + Might:**
- **≤11:** 4 + M damage
- **12-16:** 7 + M damage; push 1
- **17+:** 10 + M damage; push 3

**Effect:** You can shift 1 after this attack.

<!-- @type: feature-group | @level: 2 -->
### 2nd-Level Features

When you reach 2nd level, you gain the following features.

<!-- @type: feature -->
#### Damaging Ferocity

Your Growing Ferocity table gains the following row.

###### Damaging Ferocity Additions

| Ferocity      | Benefit                                    |
|---------------|--------------------------------------------|
| 8 (4th level) | First push on a turn grants 2 surges.      |

<!-- @type: class | @id: shadow -->
## Shadow

The shadow is a sneaky rogue who strikes from darkness.
